mapper.select: SELECT STAGE_LEVEL as stageLevel, SUB_LEVEL as subLevel, SUB_TITLE as subTitle -- (★) 테이블에 컬럼 추가 시 여기에 'as 필드명' 추가 -- , ENEMY_INFO as enemyInfo -- , REWARD_INFO as rewardInfo -- , REQUIRED_COST as requiredCost FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGES WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} ORDER BY SUB_LEVEL ASC

SELECT USER_ID as userId, STAGE_LEVEL as stageLevel, SUB_LEVEL as subLevel, IS_CLEARED as isCleared, CLEARED_AT as clearedAt FROM USER_PVE_SUBSTAGE_PROGRESS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} ORDER BY SUB_LEVEL ASC

SELECT sm.SET_NUMBER as setNumber, m.MAP_ID as mapId, m.MAP_NAME as mapName, m.DESCRIPTION as description, m.WIN_RATE_T as winRateT, m.WIN_RATE_P as winRateP, m.WIN_RATE_Z as winRateZ FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGE_MAPS sm JOIN TBL_MAPS m ON sm.MAP_ID = m.MAP_ID WHERE sm.STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND sm.SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel} ORDER BY sm.SET_NUMBER ASC

SELECT STAGE_LEVEL as stageLevel, SUB_LEVEL as subLevel, SUB_TITLE as subTitle, OPPONENT_TEAM_NAME as opponentTeamName FROM TBL_PVE_SUBSTAGES WHERE STAGE_LEVEL = #{stageLevel} AND SUB_LEVEL = #{subLevel}
